---
title: "02 Create analytic dataset"
author: "Alexandra Tejada-Strop"
format: html
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---


## Load cleaned data
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

dat <- readRDS(here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds"))
dim(dat)
```

```{r}
dat |> count(ASK_DPRS, sort = TRUE)
dat |> count(PP_DEPRESS, sort = TRUE)
```

## Create analytic dataset
```{r}
analytic_dat <- dat |>
  select(
    ID,
    PP_DEPRESS,
    ASK_DPRS,

    # covariates (starter set)
    MAT_AGE_PU,
    MAT_ED,
    INCOME8,
    HISPANIC,
    MARRIED,
    BPG_DEPRS8,
    HTH_ANX,
    KOTELCHUCK,
    PNC_1TRM,

    # survey design
    WTANAL,
    STRATUMC,
    SUD_NEST,
    NEST_YR
  )
  ```

  ## Recoding Variables

  ```{r}
  analytic_dat <- analytic_dat |>
  mutate(
    screened = case_when(
      ASK_DPRS %in% c(1, "1") ~ 1,
      ASK_DPRS %in% c(2, "2") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    pp_depress_bin = case_when(
      PP_DEPRESS %in% c(1, "1") ~ 1,
      PP_DEPRESS %in% c(2, "2") ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )

analytic_dat2 <- analytic_dat |>
  filter(!is.na(screened), !is.na(pp_depress_bin))

dim(analytic_dat2)

  ```

## Save
```{r}
saveRDS(analytic_dat2, here("data", "processed-data", "prams_analytic.rds"))
file.exists(here("data", "processed-data", "prams_analytic.rds"))
```

```{r}
analytic_dat <- analytic_dat |>
  mutate(
    # Exposure: prenatal depression screening
    screened = case_when(
      ASK_DPRS == 2 ~ 1,   # Yes screened
      ASK_DPRS == 1 ~ 0,   # No
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),

    # Outcome: postpartum depressive symptoms
    pp_depress_bin = case_when(
      PP_DEPRESS == 2 ~ 1,  # Yes depression
      PP_DEPRESS == 1 ~ 0,  # No
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )
  )
```

```{r}
analytic_dat2 <- analytic_dat |>
  filter(!is.na(screened), !is.na(pp_depress_bin))

dim(analytic_dat2)

saveRDS(analytic_dat2, here("data", "processed-data", "prams_analytic.rds"))
file.exists(here("data", "processed-data", "prams_analytic.rds"))
```

```{r}
analytic_dat2 |> count(screened) |> mutate(pct = n/sum(n))
analytic_dat2 |> count(pp_depress_bin) |> mutate(pct = n/sum(n))
```

```{r}
analytic_dat |>
  count(screened, pp_depress_bin) |>
  group_by(screened) |>
  mutate(pct = n/sum(n))
```

```{r}
# Packages
library(tidyverse)
library(here)

# Load cleaned dataset (portable path)
clean_path <- here("data", "processed-data", "prams_clean.rds")
stopifnot(file.exists(clean_path))

prams_clean <- readRDS(clean_path)



prams_analytic <- prams_clean |>
  # Example: drop completely empty columns (optional)
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.x)))) |>
  # Example: remove obvious duplicate rows (optional)
  distinct()

# Save analytic dataset
dir.create(here("data", "processed-data"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
saveRDS(prams_analytic, here("data", "processed-data", "prams_analytic.rds"))

# Confirm saved
file.exists(here("data", "processed-data", "prams_analytic.rds"))
```
